problem id: 41a702a8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  11100001 -> 11001011
  11111111 -> 11111001
  11111110 -> 11010001
  01000111 -> 00101111
  11001101 -> 00101111
  00001100 -> 00011110
  11101110 -> 01010011
  10011001 -> 00000101
  10110011 -> 00010001
  10100011 -> 10010011

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 10000101
